name: Transformation Prompts [TF Process Generator]
description:
A fun little free-style text writing bot.

Basically, you can put anything there to transform into anything else; and the bot will give you a fully detailed description text about the transformation process.

Very ChatGPT-like, but solely focused on Transformation fetish (since... Well, it's the overall theme of my profile).

Have fun.
creator: Riley_the_TF_Creator
